summary: Independent QA review found no blocking RNG semantics defect in ADR-009 alignment, deterministic domain isolation/replay, DTO serialization readiness, hidden entropy scanning, cross-worker-compatible tests, or Math.random authority guard coverage. REQUEST_CHANGES is required because packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts fails a direct Prettier check: pnpm exec prettier --check packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts exits 1. The repository pnpm format:check command exits 0 but does not currently cover packages/sim-core or packages/protocol, so the writer's format evidence is a false-negative for this touched source file.

decisions: REQUEST_CHANGES is limited to the reproducible formatting gate failure in packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts; the reviewer did not identify an RNG semantics blocker.
ADR-009 documents seed/domain semantics, DTO compatibility expectations, no-entropy constraints, and compatibility-sensitive golden-vector policy.

RNG implementation uses explicit seed plus full domain key, integer uint32 and bounded draws, DTO parse/restore, and no Math.random/Date/crypto/environment entropy was found in inspected authority RNG paths.

Tests cover golden vectors, domain isolation, mid-stream DTO replay, bounded integer draws, generated domain replay/isolation, Node worker_threads compatibility, deterministic canary hash, and Math.random guard self-test output.
No forbidden accepted ADR, PROJECT_STATUS, app, UI, platform, or content-source changes were found in the SIM-004 diff inspected during review.
risks: P3: packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts fails pnpm exec prettier --check packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts, so SIM-004 cannot be accepted under the frozen formatting/code-style gate until fixed.
The root pnpm format:check command currently misses packages/sim-core and packages/protocol, creating a false-negative format gate for this task's touched package source files.
Coordinator metadata changes under project state/routing files remain outside the RNG implementation and should be handled by lead integration policy.
requested_action: Fix the reproducible SIM-004 formatting gate failure, then rerun the targeted format check and required SIM-004 validation commands before returning to qa_reviewer.
